title: Tangy Gooey Quick-Fix Croatian Puff Pastry Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly quick-fix recipe for a tangy and gooey pastry dish featuring toastable puff pastry with a savory twist.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine egg yolk, sour cream, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and optional herbs de provence. Mix well until smooth.
Place puff pastry sheet on a baking tray lined with parchment paper or silicone mat.
Pour the mixture evenly over the puff pastry.
If using toastable puff pastry slices, lay one slice on top of the pastry dough after pouring the filling.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until golden brown and puffed up. If slicing is used, let it bake for an additional 5 minutes before removing from oven.
Let cool slightly then cut into bite-sized pieces.
Serve warm as a snack or appetizer.
